privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring student enrollment codes in OpenSIS v9.2, a real open-source Student Information System. The metadata specifies 3 entry codes (New Enrollment, Transfer from Another District, Re-enrollment After Withdrawal) and 3 exit codes (Graduated, Transferred to Another District, Expelled). These codes align with actual OpenSIS system design and NCES standard K-12 enrollment/exit code categories. The student_enrollment_codes table is verified to exist in the OpenSIS MySQL schema with appropriate columns (title, short_name, type). The codes are realistic educational data based on standard K-12 enrollment classification systems, not synthetic samples. The verifier correctly validates that entry codes contain type indicators ('add', 'entry', 'new', 'enroll', '1') and exit codes contain type indicators ('drop', 'withdraw', 'exit', '2'). All metadata values are accurate and well-founded in the OpenSIS system architecture and educational data standards.
